mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock WHERE quantity <= warning_quantity

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, COUNT(*) AS total FROM inbound_order WHERE order_status = 2 AND DATE(created_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, COUNT(*) AS total FROM outbound_order WHERE order_status = 2 AND DATE(created_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC
